creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ poudriere jail -cj clang7 -a amd64 -v projects/clang700-import -m svn+https
$ poudriere testport -j clang7 science/clhep
[...]
FAILED: CMakeFiles/CLHEPS.dir/Matrix/src/SymMatrix.cc.o 
/usr/bin/c++   -I. -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/science/clhep/work/2.4.0.4/CLHEP/Random -O -pedantic -Wall -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -std=c++11 -pthread -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -MD -MT CMakeFiles/CLHEPS.dir/Matrix/src/SymMatrix.cc.o -MF CMakeFiles/CLHEPS.dir/Matrix/src/SymMatrix.cc.o.d -o CMakeFiles/CLHEPS.dir/Matrix/src/SymMatrix.cc.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/science/clhep/work/2.4.0.4/CLHEP/Matrix/src/SymMatrix.cc
Assertion failed: (isAvailableAtLoopEntry(LHS, L) && "LHS is not available at Loop Entry"), function isLoopEntryGuardedByCond, file /poudriere/jails/headamd64PR230355/usr/src/contrib/llvm/lib/Analysis/ScalarEvolution.cpp, line 9294.
c++: error: unable to execute command: Abort trap (core dumped)
c++: error: clang frontend command failed due to signal (use -v to see invocation)
FreeBSD clang version 7.0.0 (branches/release_70 339355) (based on LLVM 7.0.0svn)
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd12.0

InstalledDir: /usr/bin
